General.Name: China Huarong Energy Co Ltd
General.Description: China Huarong Energy Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the energy exploration and production businesses. It operates through two segments, Energy Exploration and Production; and Oil Storage and Trading. The company explores for, produces, and sells crude oil and sells petroleum products. It is also involved in commodity trading business; and oil and gas trading, wholesale and distribution activities, as well as provision of oil storage services. The company was formerly known as China Rongsheng Heavy Industries Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Huarong Energy Company Limited in April 2015. China Huarong Energy Company Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Chai Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Cornell Centre, Chai Wan, Hong Kong
